creator: saurbier@math.uni-bielefeld.de
text:
- Update to 0.6.1
- This update also fixes the broken pkg-plist
- I needed to Add the line with
    CONFIGURE_ARGS= "--prefix=${PREFIX}"
  because without this line the PREFIX variable was ignored.
- I also propose the port should be moved to deskutils/ruby-alexandria to
  conform to the ruby naming standards.


Port maintainer (mitsuru@riken.jp) is cc'd.
